description:

On February 13th, 2023, Illene Gowan disappeared after leaving her job at Sugar's Diner. Her last text was to her boss: "Leave me alone, I'm done". 

Her family was shocked, but would eventually provide police with an interesting insight: Illene had been involved with two men in the past couple of weeks, both of whom had potential motives to do the unthinkable to her.

A few days later, her body was found by the roadside - escalating the case from a missing person to a murder investigation. In the midst of this deadly love triangle, detectives were left to piece together family rumors, eerie CCTV footage, and the interrogation of a cold-blooded killer.
